'''Fitch''' was a bald [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]].

==Biography==
He worked for [[Black Nebula (organization)|Black Nebula]] as of [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], and was assigned as a personal aide of [[Dequc]].

{{Char-stub}}
